chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constt: Petition No.D-2255 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 07-5-2025 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned AAG submitted that service of the petitioner’s husband was not complete for releasing the pensionary benefits. Learned counsel for the petitioner placed reliance on order dated 26-2-2025 passed in C.P No.D-1485 of 2023 and submits that he will be satisfied and would not press the instant petition, if the petitioner is permitted to approach the competent authority by filing fresh application for condonation of service period. Learned counsel submitted copy of above order along with statement, which is taken on record. In view of above submissions, the instant petition is accordingly disposed of as not pressed. However, after filing of the application, the concerned competent authority is directed to reconsider the case of the petitioner on humanitarian ground for condonation of service period and to decide the same within three months. J U D G E J U D G E Naveed Ali
